kunming.metaDescription: Stone Forest, Dianchi Lake, Green Lake, and Yunnan cuisine guide.
kunming.intro: Known as the Spring City for its year-round mild weather, Kunming blends plateau lakes, karst landscapes, and ethnic diversity—an ideal start to western Yunnan.
kunming.bestTime: Mar–May for flowers; Nov–Mar for black-headed gulls at Dianchi.
kunming.transport: Changshui Airport serves international routes. Metro covers downtown; tour buses to Stone Forest.

attractions.name: Stone Forest
attractions.desc: UNESCO karst pinnacle landscape; allow half a day.

attractions.name: Haigeng Dam
attractions.desc: Best winter gull-watching on Dianchi; cycling available.

attractions.name: Green Lake Park
attractions.desc: Central oasis with seasonal gulls and lotus.

attractions.name: Yunnan Nationalities Village
attractions.desc: Architecture and performances of 25 ethnic groups.

foods.name: Cross-Bridge Rice Noodles
foods.desc: Hot broth cooks raw ingredients at the table.

foods.name: Steam Pot Chicken
foods.desc: Slow-steamed chicken in a special clay pot.

foods.name: Wild Mushroom Hot Pot
foods.desc: Seasonal Jun–Sep; eat only well-cooked mushrooms.

dali.metaDescription: Erhai cycling, old town, Cangshan cableway, and Bai culture.
dali.intro: Dali pairs nineteen Cangshan peaks with Erhai Lake and distinctive Bai architecture. The old town, Xizhou, and Shuanglang each offer unique charm.
dali.bestTime: Mar–May and Sep–Nov ideal; Jun–Aug rainy but quieter.
dali.transport: Dali Airport and HSR station. Rent e-bikes to circle Erhai; old town is walkable.

attractions.name: Dali Old Town
attractions.desc: South Gate, Foreigner Street—best at dusk.

attractions.name: Erhai Eco Corridor
attractions.desc: Cycling with sunset at Longkan and Caicun piers.

attractions.name: Cangshan Cableway
attractions.desc: Summit views; watch for altitude sickness.

attractions.name: Chongsheng Three Pagodas
attractions.desc: Iconic 1,000-year-old towers.
